info.title: PGAI Public API
info.description: Public API for accessing PGAI data with organisation-based access control. All endpoints require API key authentication and appropriate permissions.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Your API key for authentication. Get your API key from the PGAI dashboard.

request.description: Request parameters used for the search

contacts.description: Array of content items (note: field name is "contacts" in API)

CompanyProfile.description: Customizable company profile with optional sections

total_items.description: Total number of items (alternative field name)

has_next.description: Whether there is a next page

has_previous.description: Whether there is a previous page

get.description: Returns API status and data connector connection info
Retrieve detailed information about a specific company. Requires "insights:read" permission.

400.description: Bad request - Company ID is required

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Search for accounts within your organisation. Returns matching accounts with key details.

400.description: Input Error. Check the request payload for issues.

403.description: Access denied. Additional privileges are needed.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource does not exist.

post.description: Send a chat message to the assistant for a specific company. Optionally continue an existing conversation.

400.description: Input Error. Check the request payload for issues.

403.description: Access denied. Additional privileges are needed.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource does not exist.

conversation_id.description: Optional conversation ID to continue existing conversation

get.summary: List assistant conversations for a company
get.description: Retrieve a list of assistant conversations for a specific company.

400.description: Input Error. Check the request payload for issues.

403.description: Access denied. Additional privileges are needed.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource does not exist.

get.description: Retrieve a specific assistant conversation by ID.

400.description: Input Error. Check the request payload for issues.

403.description: Access denied. Additional privileges are needed.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource does not exist.

get.description: Retrieve content associated with a company. Valid content types: email, notes, call_script, document, value_pyramid, three_whys

400.description: Input Error. Check the request payload for issues.

403.description: Access denied. Additional privileges are needed.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource does not exist.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Content type filter(s). Can specify multiple types.

get.description: Retrieve a customizable company profile with optional sections. Include can be "full" or specific sections. Sources can be true/false.

400.description: Input Error. Check the request payload for issues.

403.description: Access denied. Additional privileges are needed.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource does not exist.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Array of sections to include. Use ["full"] for everything or specific sections.

post.description: Retrieve technologies associated with a company with optional filtering by category, confidence, and favorites.

400.description: Input Error. Check the request payload for issues.

403.description: Access denied. Additional privileges are needed.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource does not exist.

category.description: Filter by technology category (UUID or name)

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific contact.
Retrieve a list of contacts with pagination.
Retrieve detailed information about specific content.
Retrieve a list of contents with pagination.
Returns the authenticated organization's active integrations and their sync status.

200.description: Success - list of connected integrations with status

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve credit information for the authenticated organization.

400.description: Input Error. Check the request payload for issues.

403.description: Access denied. Additional privileges are needed.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource does not exist.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of territories for the authenticated organization.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific territory.
Retrieve a paginated list of companies within a specific territory.

200.description: Success - paginated list of companies in the territory

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of tasks for the authenticated organization. Optionally filter by company or status.

post.description: Create a new task within the authenticated organization.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific task.

patch.description: Update an existing task. Only provided fields will be modified.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: UUID of the task to update

due_date.description: Updated due date in ISO 8601 format

get.description: Retrieve available workflows for the authenticated organization.

post.description: Trigger execution of a workflow. Returns immediately with an execution ID that can be polled for status.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing workflow_id

workflow_id.description: UUID of the workflow to trigger

get.description: Check the status and result of a previously triggered workflow execution.
Search across companies, contacts, and content in a single request. Results are grouped by type.

200.description: Success - grouped search results with totals

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of types to search. Defaults to all.

get.description: Retrieve a relevance graph for a company showing related entities as nodes and edges. Useful for understanding relationships and connections.

200.description: Success - graph with nodes and edges

post.description: Search and retrieve contacts associated with a specific company. Supports filtering by name, job title, location, and LinkedIn URL.

200.description: Success - list of contacts with pagination
